title: Repos: habits (upsert/list/count) + subscription (SecureStore)

task.description: Implement the core persistence APIs for habits in SQLite and subscription caching in SecureStore. All methods must return Result and never leak uncaught db/storage exceptions to callers.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: upsertHabit(habit) inserts or updates by id and returns Result<null,RepoError> with ok=false on db failure.
AC2: getHabits({activeOnly:true}) returns only rows where isActive=1 mapped to Habit with booleans/numbers normalized.
AC3: countActiveHabits() returns a number equal to SELECT COUNT(*) WHERE isActive=1.
AC4: saveSubscription(sub) writes JSON to SecureStore under a single key; getSubscription() returns the parsed Subscription or Err on read/parse failure.
AC5: No method throws uncaught errors; all failures return Err({type:'db'|...}).

definition_of_done: All SQL uses parameter binding (no string concat for values).
Repo methods are async and typed; no 'any'.
